name: hyperflow
description: Rules, multi-session project memory, templates, and reviewed multi-agent workflows for Codex CLI (preview; desktop App support pending certification). Issue to PR when you need it. Memory and doctrine stay in your project.

interface.shortDescription: Memory, rules, templates, and reviewed multi-agent chains for Codex CLI (preview)
interface.longDescription: Hyperflow gives Codex CLI a full engineering system (preview until lanes are certificate-backed): intent routing, multi-session project memory under .hyperflow/memory/, task templates, portable doctrine/rules, Worker-to-Reviewer specialist checks via host orchestration with inline labelled fallbacks when subagents or parallel tool calls are unavailable, optional local visual artefacts, security guardrails, and gated release. Plan and build across two sessions via git handoff packages when needed. Desktop App support is pending certification and is not claimed from CLI install alone.
defaultPrompt: Use Hyperflow to plan this feature
Show what Hyperflow remembers about this repo
